analysis_commentary: Third anomalously slow run in the warmup bisection: 95 training steps (normal ~340), first probe t=193s. max drifted 0.056→0.456 (no full collapse), illegal stayed 0.997-0.9998 (no legal-move learning), aboveU=0. Pattern is now: warmup=500 and 1500 run normally; warmup=750, 1000, 1000-replicate all ran slow. Anomaly cause is unclear and not in run.log. Regressed vs current best (illegal_min=0.235, aboveU_max=7).
